description: Controlled module_type values for Aurora Polaris MVP module manifests.

values.definition: Entry-point module for requests, authentication and policy pre-checks.
Central planning, routing, coordination and risk-confidence assessment module.
Module that manages capabilities, versions, health status and allowed execution contexts.
Module that evaluates policies, blocks violations and applies review thresholds.
Task-specific module that performs controlled domain or workflow work.
Module that stores or retrieves context, audit, provenance or knowledge references.
Module that routes cases to human review, escalation or fallback paths.
Module that controls staged promotion, blocking, rollback candidacy and release decisions.
Module that exposes governance, audit, policy and release status for review.
Module that processes telemetry, anomalies, drift signals or process-deviation hints for MVP control use.
